'''''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' is a strategy guide for [[Sony]] Online Entertainment's MMORPG [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']]. It was published by [[Prima Games]] in July [[2003]], simultaneously with the original release of the game.

Due to continuous updates and changes, two expansions and one complete overhaul of the game (the so called "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]"), many parts of this strategy guide eventually became outdated and described features that were no longer in the game.
